heading: Omitted
label: 912 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which related to per capita payments to tribal members from funds appropriated for a certain judgment against the United States and exemption of such payments from Federal and State income taxes, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 86–97, § 273 Stat. 222July 17, 1959
